name: Polenta Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Vanilla Bean or 1 Teaspoon Vanilla Extract
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Generously butter an 8-inch by 1-inch square baking pan.
In a large bowl, combine the sugar and softened butter. Mix in egg yolks and orange and lemon zests. Add vanilla seeds or extract.
Using an electric mixer, beat until smooth, light, and creamy, about 2 minutes.
In a food processor, finely grind almonds with polenta, cornmeal, cornstarch, and baking powder.
In a medium bowl, beat egg whites with remaining sugar until they form soft peaks. Gently fold dry ingredients and half the beaten egg whites into the butter mixture. Then gently fold in the remaining egg whites just until incorporated.
Gently scrape batter evenly into prepared pan. Bake for about 30 minutes, or until golden top is formed and a cake tester inserted into center comes out clean. Transfer to cooling rack for 10 minutes; then invert on rack and let cool completely. Sprinkle with confectioner's sugar, cut into pieces, and serve with topping.
